prompt: Build a form for updating contact details: full name, email address, phone number, and a dropdown for preferred contact method (email, SMS, post). It needs inline validation and should show a success message after saving.

assertions.name: no-raw-form-elements
assertions.description: No raw <input>, <select>, or <button> elements. Hearth components (TextInput, Select, Button) used instead.

assertions.name: uses-hearth-inputs
assertions.description: TextInput from hearth-react is used for the full name, email address, and phone number fields.

assertions.name: uses-hearth-select
assertions.description: Select and SelectItem from hearth-react are used for the preferred contact method dropdown.

assertions.name: validation-present
assertions.description: Form validation logic is present. Fields show validationStatus='invalid' and validationText with error messages on invalid input.

assertions.name: success-feedback
assertions.description:
On successful save, an Alert component from hearth-react with colorScheme='positive' (or similar) is shown. Not a raw
or

.

assertions.name: uses-hearth-button
assertions.description: The submit action uses Button from hearth-react, not a raw <button>.

assertions.name: test-file-exists
assertions.description: A ContactDetailsForm.test.tsx file is present and contains at least one test.
